calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration.
Off Calendar May-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. AMY S. MORKETTER, Esq. of Phil Dyson Law (Tel: 619-462-3311) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS SEAL ROCK CAPITAL LLC, MATTHEW BLAIR, AND MICHAEL BLAIR'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Respondents' unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/SRB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS SEAL ROCK CAPITAL LLC, MATTHEW BLAIR and MICHAEL BLAIR's Motion To Compel Arbitration is Transferred to be heard on the law and motion calendar (room 302) on the same date at 9:30 a.m.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
